The binoculars provide a clear and sharp image, which is ensured by the 3-element lenses in two groups and the multiple anti-reflective coating used on the optics. Allows adjustment of the interpupillary distance in the range of 53-74 mm. It can also be used by wearers of dioptric glasses, it allows diopter adjustment ±4D. The Levenhuk New Karma Plus binoculars are suitable for medium and long distance observation. Több mint 50 fénymód és 6 zenei mód áll rendelkezésre, amelyeket saját színkombinációkkal is kiegészíthetsz.
